name: LiveWire Group, Inc.
summary: PART I General LiveWire Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and its consolidated subsidiaries are referred to in this Form 10-K as we, our, us, the Company, or LiveWire. LiveWire is an industry-leading all-electric motorcycle brand with a focus on pioneering the growing two-wheel electric motorcycle space. LiveWire was a direct, wholly owned subsidiary of AEA-Bridges Impact Corp (ABIC), which was originally incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company on July 29, 2020, as a special purpose...
